Title: Authorizes the town of Clarkstown to establish community preservation funds and to impose a real estate transfer tax; repealer
Summary: Authorizes the town of Clarkstown to establish community preservation funds and to impose a real estate transfer tax with revenues therefrom to be deposited in the community preservation fund; provides for the repeal of certain provisions upon expiration thereof.
LawCode: Add §64-m, Town L; add Art 31-K §§1450-aa - 1450-pp, Tax L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the town law, in relation to authorizing the town of Clarkstown to establish community preservation funds; to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the town of Clarkstown to impose a real estate transfer tax; and providing for the repeal of certain provisions upon expiration thereof
